channel.title: Feminism on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Feminism on emsenn.net

item.title: Jineoloji
item.description: Jineoloji (from Kurmanji jin, “woman,” and Greek -loji, “science”) is the Kurdish women’s movement’s indigenous feminist theory: the “science of women” or, more precisely, the science of free life grounded in the liberation of women. It is not an import of Western feminism into Kurdish politics but an intellectual production of the Kurdish women’s movement itself, developed through decades of armed struggle, political education, and theoretical debate within the PKK and its affiliated organizations.
